nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sarothrura
nodes.summary: Sarothrura（Sarothrura）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如Buff-spotted flufftail、Chestnut-headed flufftail、Streaky-breasted flufftail等9种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Red-chested flufftail
nodes.summary: The red-chested flufftail (Sarothrura rufa) is a species of bird in the family Sarothruridae. It is found in sub-Saharan Africa from Liberia to Ethiopia and south to South Africa. The red-chested flufftail prefers habitats with greater canopy cover. It can be found in environments near white-winged flufftails, but tends to avoid direct spacial overlap. References External links Red-chested flufftail - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
